red_failure_evidence: The previous formatter emitted only one session-wide `$22 billed · 1.1M new · 18.5M cached` summary, so new and cached usage could not be attributed to individual models.
verification_run: Syntax checks plus a real-session structural assertion requiring each observed model to carry cost, new, and cached fields and a final billed total; repeated once through the signature cache.
verification_result: Per-model cost/new/cached segments rendered and cache replay was byte-identical.
